app.name: DomestIQ
app.tagline: A safer, smarter way for workers and households to connect
search.title: Find Workers
consent.title: Privacy Consent
consent.message: We collect and process your personal information in accordance with the POPI Act. By continuing, you consent to our data practices.
landing.hero.badge: Built for Mzansi. Built for us.
landing.hero.subtext: DomestIQ connects domestic workers and households across South Africa — with verified profiles, honest reviews, and real trust. Phone-first. All 11 languages. Always free for workers.
landing.problem.waiting_title: Waiting for a call that might not come
landing.problem.waiting_desc: Skilled workers sit outside estate gates for hours, hoping someone will need them today.
landing.problem.door_title: Opening the door to a stranger
landing.problem.door_desc: No ID, no reviews, no references. You just have to hope the person is who they say they are.
landing.problem.cash_title: Getting paid short — with no recourse
landing.problem.cash_desc: No paper trail. No proof of the job done. If the cash comes up short, that's that.
landing.worker.body: Millions of workers across SA rely on word-of-mouth. When one client falls away, it can mean weeks with nothing. DomestIQ changes that — build your profile once, and your reviews, references, and reputation follow you.
landing.worker.b1_desc: Bookings come straight to your phone. No more waiting at gates or asking around.
landing.worker.b2_desc: Every good job earns a review. Every review brings the next job. You never start from zero again.
landing.worker.b3_desc: Clients are verified too. See who you're going to before you arrive.
landing.worker.b4_desc: No email needed. Tap icons to pick your skills — no typing, no forms.
landing.worker.b5_desc: Use DomestIQ in Zulu, Xhosa, Sotho, Afrikaans — all 11 SA languages.
landing.worker.b6_desc: We never take a cut from what you earn. Not now, not ever.
landing.worker.b7_desc: Know someone good? Share your code. When they join, you both earn.
landing.worker.b8_desc: Build a professional CV from your profile. Download the PDF — it's yours to use anywhere.
landing.cv.body: Your skills, work history, and reviews — turned into a proper document you can hand to anyone. Not just for DomestIQ. It's yours.
landing.cv.step1: We pull your details from your profile
landing.cv.portable: Your CV works everywhere. Print it. Email it. Hand it over at the gate.
landing.client.body: Verified IDs. Background checks. Honest reviews from households like yours. Browse rated professionals in your area, see their work history, and connect with confidence.
landing.client.b1_desc: Every worker can verify their SA ID and criminal clearance. You see the badge before you book.
landing.client.b2_desc: Ratings from actual households. Written references you can read before deciding.
landing.client.b3_desc: See workers in your area, sorted by distance. Find someone around the corner.
landing.client.b4_desc: Once-off or recurring. Pick a date, pick a time, send the request. Done.
landing.how.ws1_desc: Tap icons to pick your skills. No typing, no forms, no email needed.
landing.how.ws2_desc: Your profile, rating, and availability show up when people search your area.
landing.how.ws3_desc: Accept or decline. Set your own rates and schedule. You're in charge.
landing.how.ws4_desc: Good work earns reviews. Reviews earn more bookings. It compounds.
landing.how.client_title: If you need help at home
landing.how.cs1_desc: Filter by what you need, how far away, and how well they're rated.
landing.how.cs2_desc: Read reviews, see verification badges, look at their work history.
landing.how.cs3_desc: Send a request or chat first. Sort out the details between you.
landing.how.cs4_desc: Your rating helps good workers get seen. It keeps the whole community honest.
landing.services.subtext: From daily household help to skilled trades. Workers list what they do. You find exactly who you need.
landing.stories.s1_quote: I used to wait weeks between jobs. Now I get bookings every week. My children can eat properly.
landing.stories.s2_quote: I cannot read well but the pictures make it easy. I registered by myself. No help needed.
landing.stories.s3_quote: Before, I had no proof I'm good at what I do. Now my reviews speak for me. Clients trust me before I arrive.
landing.stories.s4_quote: Finding someone I trust used to mean asking friends and hoping for the best. Not anymore.
landing.stories.s5_quote: I know exactly who's coming to my house. When you have kids, that matters more than anything.
landing.stories.s6_quote: I set my own rates. Nobody takes a cut. I earned R8,000 last month through DomestIQ alone.
landing.cta.heading_1: South Africa runs on domestic work.
landing.cta.heading_2: It's time it worked for everyone.
landing.cta.body: Every worker who builds a profile creates proof of their skill. Every household that books builds trust in the community. Together, we're building something South Africa has never had.
landing.footer.disclaimer: DomestIQ is a matching platform. We do not create an employment relationship between users.
landing.trust.t1_desc: Your data is protected under SA law
landing.trust.t2_desc: SA ID checked by our team
landing.trust.t3_desc: Message through the platform — no personal numbers shared
landing.faq.q1: Is DomestIQ really free for workers?
landing.faq.a1: Yes. Workers keep every rand they earn — we never take a commission. The platform runs on a small service fee paid by the household when they book.
landing.faq.a2: Any phone with internet access works. DomestIQ runs in your browser — Android or iPhone. No download needed. You can add it to your home screen like an app.
landing.faq.a3: Workers upload their SA ID and criminal clearance. Our team checks the documents and gives verified workers a gold badge. Verified workers get booked more.
landing.faq.a4: Fully POPIA compliant. Your data is encrypted, never sold, and only shared with your consent.
landing.faq.a5: Joburg, Cape Town, Durban, Pretoria, PE, and more cities every month. Register now even if your area isn't listed yet — we're expanding fast.
landing.faq.a6: Search for a worker, check their profile and reviews, then request a date and time. The worker accepts or declines. You can also message them first to sort out details.
landing.faq.q7: Can I book someone for a once-off job?
landing.faq.a7: Yes — once-off or recurring, both work. Need a deep clean this Saturday or a gardener every Wednesday? Either way.
landing.faq.a8: All 11 official SA languages — English, isiZulu, isiXhosa, Afrikaans, Sesotho, and more. Workers can register and chat in the language they're most comfortable with.
landing.cities.subtext: Workers and households connecting in major metros. More cities every month.
landing.cities.not_listed: Don't see your area? Register anyway — we're growing fast.
landing.pwa.title: Add DomestIQ to Home Screen
landing.pwa.desc: Quick access to bookings, messages, and more.
